item.title: Digital Exploration & Self-Hosting Mastery
item.description: As a dedicated content creator, my weekly routine is immersed in exploring the latest digital tools and self-hosting applications. My mission is to establish a personal platform for sharing in-depth research and insights on these topics annually.

item.title: 3. Setup-External Services
item.description: Github Create Github Authorization Token In a browser navigate to github.com Navigate to Settings menus: Settings (Under menu opened from user icon in top right) Developer Settings ...

item.title: 1. Overview
item.description: Website deployment is divided into two stages: one-time setup (where we create the infrastructure for hosting a website based on markdown content) and maintenance ...

item.title: 2. Setup-Internal Services
item.description: Gitea We will be leveraging gitea to create two repo’s: Obsidian Vault: Empty Repo Quartz: Cloned from Public repo With these two repo’s generated we will then setup obsidian to synchronize ...

item.title: LLM Prompt Development
item.description: Background Home assistant recently released the home assistant release preview edition which is open source hardware specifically gear for development of a locally hosted home ...

item.title: Effective Knowledge Management: Using Obsidian for Productivity and Security
item.description: Work In Progress: TODO This article is a work in progress, and a current topic of research. Meta Bind Plugin: Button Development Update image to diagram of work-flow In today’s fast-paced digital world, effective personal knowledge management (PKM) is essential for maintaining clarity and productivity.
